---
title: Courses & Training
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)

courses <- yaml::read_yaml("data/courses.yml")

for (course in courses) {

  cat("### ", course$title, "\n\n")

  meta <- course$role
  if (!is.null(course$year)) {
    meta <- paste(meta, course$year, sep = " • ")
  }

  cat(meta, "\n\n")

  if (!is.null(course$description)) {
    cat(course$description, "\n\n")
  }

  if (!is.null(course$resources)) {
    for (nm in names(course$resources)) {
      url <- course$resources[[nm]]
      if (!is.null(url) && nzchar(url)) {
        cat("[", toupper(nm), "](", url, ")", sep = "")
        cat(" | ")
      }
    }
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  if (!is.null(course$tags)) {
    cat("*Tags:* ", paste(course$tags, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
  }

  cat("---\n\n")
}
```
